description_long: This is a vintage-style armchair upholstered in worn, dark red leather with a diamond-tufted backrest and a matching seat cushion. Draped over the right side and back of the chair is a large, yellow-green tartan blanket featuring a red and black plaid pattern. The armchair has high, winged sides and rounded, padded armrests, giving it a classic and inviting appearance. The legs are short, curved, and made of dark wood, elevating the chair slightly off the ground. The leather surface shows signs of age and use, with visible creases and scuffs, adding to its character. The overall look suggests comfort and warmth, making it suitable for urban settings like a sidewalk, park, or neighborhood porch.
description: A vintage, dark red leather armchair with diamond-tufted upholstery and a plaid blanket draped over one side. The chair features high winged sides, padded armrests, and curved wooden legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the diamond-tufted backrest, seat cushion, and the plaid blanket draped over the right side.
description_view_1: Right side view dominated by the draped plaid blanket, partially covering the armrest and side of the chair.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, worn leather back and the blanket hanging down the right side.
description_view_3: Left side view highlighting the curved armrest and the blanket cascading over the back and side.
attribute_armrest_design: padded and upholstered, rounded, integrated with chair body
